pages.text: A highly sophisticated forge that operates at the molecular level. The $(item)Primal Catalyst$() must be fed exactly 3 distinct specific ingredients and extreme amounts of $(alien)Entropy$() to synthesize legendary artifacts.

pages.title: Power Source
pages.text: The Primal Catalyst requires $(l:patchouli:machines/entropy_reservoir)Entropy$() to operate! Connect it to your $(l:patchouli:machines/pyramid_core)Pyramid$() using $(l:patchouli:machines/entropy_cables)Entropy Cables$() to supply the massive amounts of energy needed for crafting.

pages.title: Recipes
pages.text: Currently, its primary known usage is forging the $(l:patchouli:materials/alloys_disks)Inertial Stability Alloy$() - a critical component for advanced pyramid operation. The recipe requires:$()- 2x $(l:patchouli:materials/graviton)Graviton$()$- 1x $(l:patchouli:materials/neutrion)Neutrion Ingot$()
